snippet: I would like to use Searxng in Open WebUI but need an instance that supports json. Are there any public instances that support json formatting?

name: SearXNG Search - LiteLLM Docs

name: SearXNG Documentation (2026.6.30+d115c61a7)
snippet:
SearXNG is a free internet metasearch engine which aggregates results from up to 280 search services. Users are neither tracked nor profiled. Search API Plugins
Welcome to SearXNG¶. Search without being tracked. SearXNG is a free internet metasearch engine which aggregates results from up to 280 search services.

name: SearxNG Search API — LangChain 0.0.149
snippet:
This page covers how to use the SearxNG search API within LangChain. You need to activate the json format to use the API. return a JSON object with the results.

name: thedoggybrad/thesearxng: The SearXNG gateway and UI  - GitHub
snippet: It aims to deliver a randomized SearXNG searching experience with the focus on making your search data not only sent to a single instance.

name: SearXNG instances
snippet: Online and offline SearXNG instances. The instances have to send the Server-Timing header to providing the Server, Load, Network and Processing times.

name: OpenWebUI has an option for a SearXNG API key - Cloudron Forum
snippet: If you are using Cloudron, you can run both OpenWebUI and an instance of SearXNG to create an API key to provide yourself with search capability.
